candidate_definition_hints.text: An easy 1-click way to create beautiful artwork on your PC using AI, with no tech knowledge. Provides a browser UI for generating images from text prompts and images. Just enter your text prompt, and see the generated image.
Does not require technical knowledge, does not require pre-installed software. 1-click install, powerful features, friendly community.
